package rulecoverage

func PositiveFmtSprintfOctalToString() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_sprintf_octal_to_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%o\", ...)` instead of direct `strconv` integer formatting."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
